block_00: What happened during the first month of the year?
block_01: Probably, the highest-profile event of the past month was the GameStop stock price rally, which began in the end of 2020 but only gained momentum in January. A first in the history of stock trading occasion of individual investors, who demand justice, uniting against a large hedge fund.
block_02: How could a Reddit community called “Wall Street Bets” drive the stock of a video game retailer up by 2000% and what are the consequences of that? And what made them unite in the first place?
block_03: Don’t miss this news: this could be the start of a completely new trading era. Read on to find out more.
